name: slimdown-mermaid
description: Mermaid diagram extension for slimdown-js fenced code blocks.

scripts.patch: npm run build && npm version patch --force -m "Patch release" && npm publish && git push --follow-tags
scripts.minor: npm run build && npm version minor --force -m "Minor release" && npm publish && git push --follow-tags
scripts.major: npm run build && npm version major --force -m "Major release" && npm publish && git push --follow-tags
